title: Stop Trading Order Blocks (Here's What Actually Works in 2026)
description: Everyone in the ICT community is obsessed with order blocks. But here's the truth — chasing order blocks alone is why most traders keep losing. The R2F Trading system reveals what smart money is actually doing before price moves. Watch before your next trade. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily setups.
script: Stop hunting order blocks. Seriously. That's why your funded account keeps blowing. MYTH: Price always respects the nearest order block. Wrong. Over 70% of visible order blocks get violated before any real move. Smart money sweeps liquidity FIRST. Then the real move begins. TRUTH: Look for the Fair Value Gap LEFT AFTER the sweep. That's your entry. Liquidity sweep plus FVG confirmation. That's the R2F Trading system. That's what funded traders actually use. Follow R2F Trading. Free breakdown at r2ftrading.com. New setups every single day.
